lineage_provenance.raw: lunch box 3.5g (1 8 oz) lunch box is a flavor packed hybrid that serves sweet nostalgia with a grown up kick. a cross of wedding cake and project 4516 this strain blends creamy frosting vanilla gas and a fruity swirl reminiscent of your favorite childhood treats. the aroma is loud—like a dessert table doused in diesel—with hints of grape candy and sugary funk. expect smooth expansive smoke and a flavor that lingers long after the exhale. effects hit in layers first a euphoric head high that lifts your mood then a cozy body buzz that melts tension without knocking you out. ideal for creative afternoons chill hangs or whenever you’re craving something sweet with a little punch. flower type 1 flow gardens

slapz 3.5g (1 8 oz) slapz is an indica dominant hybrid (runtz x grease monkey) known for its fast acting uplifting effects that ease into deep body relaxation. expect sweet citrus flavors with floral lavender notes complemented by an aroma of lemon spice and subtle diesel. dense frosty buds with blue green hues make this strain as beautiful as it is potent. flower hybrid type 1 flow gardens

crystal candy thca 14 grams total cannabinoids 33.18% thca 26% δ 9 thc <0.3% with a delightful aroma reminiscent of sweet and fruity candy crystal candy thca flower is a true sensory experience for the cannabis connoisseur. our crystal candy thca buds are meticulously cultivated and carefully harvested ensuring premium quality and potency. crystal candy thca is an indica leaning hybrid strain and is best used at the end of the day to relax and unwind. in its raw form thca is non psychoactive meaning it does not produce the intoxicating effects commonly associated with thc. however when exposed to heat such as through smoking vaping or decarboxylation (a process that involves heating the plant material) thca converts into thc becoming psychoactive. *due to the thc present we recommend that you find what dosage works for you in a comfortable environment and avoid operating heavy machinery.* these statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose treat cure or prevent any disease. all products contain less than 0.3% δ9 thc. flower
